demographics.living_situation: lives with a roommate, who is present and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Please help — my mate got kicked in the chest by a horse a couple of hours ago and now he can't breathe, he's gone really pale and cold and he keeps saying he's dizzy and about to pass out. (Patient, gasping: "I can't breathe, my right chest is crushed, and I feel so cold and dizzy.")
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: He was fine-ish after it happened but over the last half hour he's got much worse — whiter, colder, and nearly fainted when he tried to sit up.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 2 hours ago, straight after a horse kicked him hard in the right side of the chest
symptom_narrative.duration: 2 hours, and much worse in the last 30 minutes
symptom_narrative.character: he says it's a heavy, crushing feeling in the right chest and it hurts more every time he tries to breathe in
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: he says it's the worst pain he's ever had and he can't get a proper breath
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right side of the chest where the hoof hit him
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and getting steadily worse, not coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helps — sitting still is the only thing he can manage
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: breathing in, and trying to move or sit up makes him feel faint
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: gasping for air, feels freezing cold and clammy, very dizzy, keeps drifting off and going quiet
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: he's slumped on the couch, can't stand, can't really talk in full sentences

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: was handling a horse when it kicked him in the chest; lives with the roommate who is with him now

objective_data_offered.value: he looks very pale, sweaty and clammy, is slumped on the couch gasping for air and can't stand up
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: carer/video impression only — not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: roommate says he's gone whiter, colder and more lethargic over the last 30 minutes and nearly fainted when he tried to sit up
patient says he feels freezing cold, very dizzy, and like he's about to black out
clear history of a forceful horse kick to the right chest about 2 hours ago; no obvious large external bleeding seen
